raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1400 and ACA 11 would guarantee comprehensive, high-quality health care for all Californians as a human right.",
    "AB 1400 offers a progressive taxation plan to fund comprehensive, universal single-payer health care coverage.",
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated already existing disparities in the healthcare system.",
    "Nearly 3 million Californians have no health insurance.",
    "Millions more Californians have insurance that they can’t afford to use because their copays and deductibles are too high.",
    "For-profit insurance companies and healthcare systems are reporting record-breaking profits during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The United States is the only country in the developed world without a system of universal healthcare.",
    "57 percent of all Californians supported replacing private insurance with guaranteed coverage provided by the government."
  ]
}
```
